chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.244 of 2019 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For orders on Nazir Report dt 20.11.2019 2.For orders on office objection a/w reply as at A 3.For orders on CMA No.3637/2019 4.For hg of CMA No.3636/2019 5.For hg of CMA No.616/2020 6.For hg of main case 7.For hg of CMA No.2065/2029 8.For hg of CMA No.3635/2019 03.02.2025. Mr. Aitzaz Manzoor, advocate for appellants. Mr. Imran Taj, advocate for respondent No. 4. Ms. Nazia Siddiqui, advocate for KDA. M/s. Afsheen Aman, Amir Ali and Manzoor Hussain Abro, advocates for SBCA. Mr. Altaf Ahmed Sahar, Assistant Attorney General. After hearing the parties, it has come to transpire that appellants have filed applications before SBCA for commercialization of subject property viz. Plot No.55, situated in Kokan Muslim Cooperative Housing Society, Alamgir Road, Karachi, which applications are still pending and not decided. Learned counsel for SBCA submits that within a period of two months, a decision on those applications would be made and appellants will be communicated such decision in the Suit bearing No.2543 of 2017, where the trial is pending. Accordingly, this appeal is disposed of along with pending applications in above manner. However, observation made herein will not reflect on the merits of the case in trial before the learned single Judge. The appeal is accordingly disposed of along with pending applications in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
